defs: The act of hallucinating; a wandering of the mind; error; mistake; a blunder.
quotes: This must have been the hallucination of the transcriber.

defs: The perception of objects which have no reality, or of sensations which have no corresponding external cause, arising from disorder of the nervous system, as in delirium tremens; delusion.
quotes: Hallucinations are always evidence of cerebral derangement and are common phenomena of insanity.
